author: codex-tier2
summary: CI keeps flagging missing evidence-prune/capability receipts whenever the pointer isn’t committed.

insight: Scripts such as check_capability_inventory and check_evidence_prune look for git-tracked receipts. Local runs don’t count until the artifacts live on main.
Every time we refresh bus_guard/hash_ledger or evidence prune locally but forget to push the new receipts, CI fails and burns time.

Standardize a habit: store heartbeat outputs under docs/usage/capability-heartbeat/, install `_report/usage/evidence-prune/latest.json` via the automation CLI, and push those receipts before rerunning guards.
